scripts.check: npm --prefix back-end-gest-o run lint && npm --prefix front-end-gest-o run check
scripts.test: npm --prefix back-end-gest-o run test && npm --prefix front-end-gest-o run test:unit
scripts.build: npm --prefix back-end-gest-o run build && npm --prefix front-end-gest-o run build
scripts.deploy: node -e "console.log('Deploy automatizado entra na Sprint 6. Use render.yaml enquanto o deploy atual for Render.')"
